title: Daily Creative Queue
summary: Drafted horror-movie-group-chat brief and promoted Day 4 + typing-dots briefs to Script Ready — three visual-first carousels ready for scripting, backlog reorganized by visual obviousness.
contextSummary: Parallel agent (likely Copywriter) was drafting the same Idea-status concepts. Reconciled by keeping their Day 4 + typing-dots drafts (good prose, kept at Research status), deleting my duplicates, bumping both to Script Ready per job instructions, and keeping my horror-movie brief as the new one. TikTok creative bench is now: 5 Script Ready carousels scheduled Apr 14 → Apr 28, 1 in Research (group-chat-shame), 3 Idea-status items left (two need on-camera talent, one is the explainer bridge).
